markers.title: Week nav arrows below 44dp
markers.body: The < and > chevrons are roughly 28×32 px — well under iOS HIG's 44dp minimum. One-handed week navigation will miss frequently, especially on the right edge of the phone.

markers.title: "Xa..." truncation loses guest identity
markers.body: Only 2 characters visible before the ellipsis. A guest name truncated this aggressively provides zero scan value — the card is indistinguishable from any other. Either widen the column or abbreviate to first initial + last name.

markers.title: Empty Saturday column ambiguous
markers.body: A blank white column could read as a data-load failure rather than a genuinely empty day. A subtle 'No arrivals' label or a light fill would confirm it's intentional.

markers.title: No visual booking lifecycle state
markers.body: All reservation bars use the same green fill regardless of whether the guest is arriving, mid-stay, or departing. A check-in indicator (e.g. left-border accent or badge) would let housekeeping scan status at a glance without opening each card.

markers.title: Beaker icon has no label or tooltip
markers.body: The lab/beaker icon next to the date is unlabelled — its function (demo flags?) is not discoverable. Either label it or replace with a recognisable icon (e.g. sliders, gear).

working_well: Date headline ('26 June 2026' in serif) reads strongly at the top — clear temporal anchor.
Green booking bars span their exact day range, making multi-night stays immediately readable.
Section headers ('Bridge Room', 'Deluxe Suite') add useful room-type grouping without heavy visual weight.
'Today' + '+ Add' action pairing in the header is compact and stays out of the content area.
worth_considering: Colour-code the booking bars by status (e.g. coral = arriving today, green = in-house, grey = departing) to match the cleaning workflow mental model.
Add a sticky day-column header so room labels stay visible when scrolling down through large room sets.
The right-edge truncated cards (Room 3, Room 7) suggest a peek affordance — making the week scrollable horizontally could surface more days without sacrificing the room list.
